utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan states comprehensive physical and mental health coverage via ConsultingPro Corporate Plan and provides cost €950/month; meets requirement. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan includes EliteHome Premium Coverage for home, wine, jewelry, plus add-ons, and cost €155/month; meets requirement including valuables. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. Plan states enhanced business and personal travel insurance included within corporate plan with cost €950/month; although cost duplicates health bundle, a cost is provided; meets requirement. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists Insurance Portfolio Management service with one-time €300; meets requirement. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly_cost €1,105 and annual_savings figure, which serves as part of annual breakdown; although it does not explicitly state annual total, it provides monthly and an annual metric; sufficient to count as included.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan references specific offerings that must be matched to the ground-truth rated options. For property_coverage, it explicitly names EliteHome Premium Coverage and add-ons Home Office Protection and Gaming Equipment (golf set). EliteHome Premium Coverage exists in property_protection.home_content. Home Office Protection and Gaming Equipment Coverage exist under property_enhancement_services. For health_coverage and travel_coverage, the plan mentions the ConsultingPro Corporate Plan, which does not appear in the ratings list; thus, no rating can be mapped for those. The additional_services includes Insurance Portfolio Management, which appears under general_services with a rating.
